raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGA bija us Saulu / un
tas fehdeja fawâ Namnâ / un
winna Schkehps bija winna Roh-
kâ / un Dahwids spebleja us
tahn Stihgahm ar Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad mekleja Sauls Dah-
widu ar to Schkehpu pee See-
nas nodurt. Bet wiꞥſch nowehr-
sahs no Santa/ un tas Schkehps
eekrehje Seenâ / tad behdse
Dahwids / un tsbehdse tai pa-
fchâ Nakti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Sauls Weh-
ſtus Dahwida Namnâ winnu
fargaht/ un rihtu nokant. Scho
pastahstija winnam Mikale wix-
na Seewa/ un fazziija: Ja tu fcho
Nakti tawu Dsihwibu ne glahb-
fi/ tad tu rihtu tapfi nokants.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mikale nolaide Dah-
wtdu zaur Lohgu femmê/ un tas
nogahje un behdse/un tsglahbahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz kehme Mikale wee-
nu Tehlu/ un likfe to us Gultu/
un weenu Kasas-Ahdu likke wix-
na tam Galw-Galli/ un apsedse
to ar Drehbehn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Sauls Wehst-
neſchus Dahwidu atwest/ bet
winna fazziija : Wiꞥſch irr ne-
wehels.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Sauls Weh-
stus Dahwidu apluhkoht/ un faz-
zija: Neffeet to ar Gultu pee
man augſcham/ ka tas tohp no-
kauts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu tee Wehstnetchi
nahze / rangi tad bija weens
Tehls Gultâ/ un weena Kasas-
Ahda winna Galw-Galli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazziija Sanlus M-
kalt : Kapelz eſti tu mannta pe-
wihluti/ un mannu Eennidnee-
atlaidusi/ ka tas irr aisbehds-
Bet Mikale fazziija us Saulu
Wiꞥſch fazziija us man: Atla-
man / kapelz buhs man tew ni-
kant?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta behdse Dahwids / u-
tsglahbahs / un nahze pee S-
muelu uhs Rahmatu/ nn stah-
ja tain wiffu/ ko Sauls tam-
darrijs/ un wiꞥſch gahje lihds-
Samuelu / un palikke eek-
Najota.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Saulam tappe flu-
dinahts / un fazzihts: Rang-
Dahwids irr eekſch Najota p-
Rahmatas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Sauls Weh-
neſchus Dahwidu atwest. T-
redseja weenu Praweeschn Pu-
Praweeschn Wallohu ſakka-
un Sammelu tur stahwam p-
wixnu Usranditaju. Tad na-
tas Deewa Garß pahr Sa-
Wehstnescheem/ ka tee arrt Pa-
weeschn Wallohu fazziija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas tappe Saulam flu-
dinahts/ tad fuhttija wiꞥſch o-
trus Wehstneschus/ ir tee flud-
naja Praweeschn Wallohu. T-
fuhttija Sauls wehl tresch-
Wehstneſchus/ tee arridsan flu-
dinaja Praweeschn Wallohu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gahje wiꞥſch arrids-
pats us Rahmatu/ un nahze i-
to leelu Akku/ kas pee Seku bi-
un waizaja/ fazzidams: Kur-
Samuels un Dahwids? tad ta-
pe w
"
    }
  ],
